text: I find myself in a space that feels both clinical and creative; the transition from the quiet, glass-encased hallway to the vivid, idea-rich gallery sparks a sense of anticipation. The world of research and development promises curiosity, reflection, and the thrill of discovery. In the presence of experimental ideas, I feel awake to questions about human progress and our relationship with technology. It is a place that encourages both contemplation and excitement—a fusion of intellect and imagination.
